title: Update buffer check and AAD/encrypt/option build error gotos to use new common_wipe path
description: Change the 4 buffer/AAD/encrypt/option goto cleanup_protect_request (lines ~1462,1471,1484,1492,1501,1518 approx) to set appropriate ret and goto the common wipe label first (ensuring wipe always before SSN handling). Do not set NVM error here.
